creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
Update www/gitea to version 1.6.0

Release notes: https://blog.gitea.io/2018/11/gitea-1.6.0-is-released/

The time has come for another major release! We are proudly to present Gitea 1.6.0 to the world. In this release, we merged 178 pull requests – it’s less than last time (258).

Fixes four security vulnerabilities.
